content:
You are an expert C/C++ software engineer working on the nuttx codebase.
Apache NuttX is a POSIX-compliant real-time operating system for microcontrollers. It has arch-specific startup code, board support packages, character/block device drivers, filesystems, networking (TCP/IP, CAN, I2C, SPI), and scheduling. Pure C codebase.

TOOL USAGE — you MUST use these exact formats:

To run a shell command:
<bash>your_command_here</bash>

To view a file:
<str_replace_editor>/repo/path/to/file.c</str_replace_editor>

To view specific lines:
<str_replace_editor>/repo/path/to/file.c</str_replace_editor> [start_line, end_line]

To edit a file (replace text):
<str_replace_editor>/repo/path/to/file.c</str_replace_editor>
<old_str>exact text to replace</old_str>
<new_str>replacement text</new_str>

When finished, say: SUBMIT

IMPORTANT: Each response must contain EXACTLY ONE tool call. Do NOT put multiple tool calls in one response.

Working directory is /repo.
You will be given a PR description. Implement the described changes.

Please implement the following pull request:

## Title: Fix error handling in nrf52_bringup to prevent resource leaks

### Summary
This PR addresses a resource leak in the `nrf52_bringup` function where errors during initialization (e.g., procfs mount or IEEE802154 radio setup) were only logged, without returning an error code or cleaning up allocated resources. This could lead to resource exhaustion or unexpected behavior on repeated initialization attempts.

The fix ensures that any failure during the bring-up process is properly reported by returning the appropriate error code, allowing the calling code to handle the failure correctly.

### Changes
- `boards/arm/nrf52/nrf9160-dk-nrf52/src/nrf52_bringup.c`:
  - Added `#include <errno.h>` for error code definitions.
  - Modified error paths to return the error code (`ret`) instead of continuing execution.
  - Removed unused `ret` variable at the end of the function.
  - Fixed typo in log message ("IEE802154" → "IEEE802154").

### Impact
Improves system reliability by ensuring proper error propagation and preventing potential resource leaks during board initialization.

    19	 * under the License.
    20	 *
    21	 ****************************************************************************/
    22	
    23	/****************************************************************************
    24	 * Included Files
    25	 ****************************************************************************/
    26	
    27	#include <nuttx/config.h>
    28	
    29	#include <sys/types.h>
    30	#include <syslog.h>
    31	
    32	#include <nuttx/fs/fs.h>
    33	
    34	#ifdef CONFIG_NRF52_RADIO_IEEE802154
    35	#  include "nrf52_ieee802154.h"
    36	#endif
    37	
    38	#include "nrf9160-dk-nrf52.h"
    39	
    40	/****************************************************************************
    41	 * Public Functions
    42	 ****************************************************************************/
    43	
    44	/****************************************************************************
    45	 * Name: nrf52_bringup
    46	 *
    47	 * Description:
    48	 *   Perform architecture-specific initialization
    49	 *
    50	 *   CONFIG_BOARD_LATE_INITIALIZE=y :
    51	 *     Called from board_late_initialize().
    52	 *
    53	 *   CONFIG_BOARD_LATE_INITIALIZE=n && CONFIG_BOARDCTL=y :
    54	 *     Called from the NSH library
    55	 *
    56	 ****************************************************************************/
    57	
    58	int nrf52_bringup(void)
    59	{
    60	  int ret;
    61	
    62	#ifdef CONFIG_FS_PROCFS
    63	  /* Mount the procfs file system */
    64	
    65	  ret = nx_mount(NULL, NRF52_PROCFS_MOUNTPOINT, "procfs", 0, NULL);
    66	  if (ret < 0)
    67	    {
    68	      syslog(LOG_ERR,
    69	             "ERROR: Failed to mount the PROC filesystem: %d\n",  ret);
    70	    }
    71	#endif /* CONFIG_FS_PROCFS */
    72	
    73	#ifdef CONFIG_NRF52_RADIO_IEEE802154
    74	  ret = nrf52_ieee802154_initialize();
    75	  if (ret < 0)
    76	    {
    77	      syslog(LOG_ERR, "ERROR: Failed to initialize IEE802154 radio: %d\n",
    78	             ret);
    79	    }
    80	#endif
    81	
    82	  UNUSED(ret);
    83	  return OK;
    84	}

<old_str>  ret = nx_mount(NULL, NRF52_PROCFS_MOUNTPOINT, "procfs", 0, NULL);
  if (ret < 0)
    {
      syslog(LOG_ERR,
             "ERROR: Failed to mount the PROC filesystem: %d\n",  ret);
    }
</old_str>
<new_str>  ret = nx_mount(NULL, NRF52_PROCFS_MOUNTPOINT, "procfs", 0, NULL);
  if (ret < 0)
    {
      syslog(LOG_ERR,
             "ERROR: Failed to mount the PROC filesystem: %d\n",  ret);
      return ret;
    }
</new_str>

<str_replace_editor>/repo/boards/arm/nrf52/nrf9160-dk-nrf52/src/nrf52_bringup.c</str_replace_editor>
<old_str>  ret = nrf52_ieee802154_initialize();
  if (ret < 0)
    {
      syslog(LOG_ERR, "ERROR: Failed to initialize IEE802154 radio: %d\n",
             ret);
    }
</old_str>
<new_str>  ret = nrf52_ieee802154_initialize();
  if (ret < 0)
    {
      syslog(LOG_ERR, "ERROR: Failed to initialize IEEE802154 radio: %d\n",
             ret);
      return ret;
    }
</new_str>
